sequence: Auto eases left and right over a soft road shadow.
Three radar rings pulse outward from the GPS center.
Location pins fade in staggered order, then disappear for seamless loop.
meta.timing: 0-400ms settle, 400-1600ms radar pulse, 1600-2000ms pin fade reset.
meta.rive: State machine: idle_loop; inputs: theme, reduceMotion. Artboards: auto, radar, pins.
meta.darkTheme: Swap surface/text tokens and reduce road opacity by 20%.
meta.optimization: Vector-only shapes, no raster images, no masks, short timeline, shared palette tokens.
